  as={"h1"}

  children={"Remove a group role assignment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/authorization/groups/{group_id}/role_assignments/{role_assignment_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Remove a specific role assignment from a group by its ID.
